The '''Corellian Stock Exchange''' ('''CSE''') was a financial institution, located in [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]], [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], in which all sorts of commodities, securities like stocks and other forms of legal investment were traded among its members. Together with the open-air market of [[Treasure Ship Row/Legends|Treasure Ship Row]] it usually housed a large amount of inhabitants, including [[black marketeer]]s, and was known to be a pretty intense place for any dealer of its kind.<ref name="CATCW71" /><ref name="GG11">''[[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations]]'', P. 65.</ref>
